_note: Validator returns epicStatus=SUCCESS; the rework-decision BRANCH maps "SUCCESS": null, which BranchBehaviourHandler now routes as a matched-but-empty branch that completes without falling through to the 'default' branch (mark-epic-failed-blueprint). The run ends COMPLETED with epicStatus=SUCCESS and never visits mark-epic-failed. This asserts the corrected behaviour after the explicit-null branch-routing fix (#101); the earlier suspected-defect pin (finding-epic-branch-null.md) is resolved.
